section.p: The Greedy Method is a simple, intuitive, and efficient approach to solving optimization problems.
Prim's Algorithm is a Greedy Method used to find the Minimum Spanning Tree (MST) of a graph.

ul.li: Start with an empty tree and grow it by adding the smallest available edge at each step.
Choose an arbitrary vertex as the starting point.
Find the smallest edge connected to the starting vertex.
Add the edge to the tree and mark both vertices as visited.
Repeat steps 3-4 until all vertices are visited.
